programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the remaining bakers to make a fruity spring dessert in a skillet to enjoy around the campfire; each baker is assigned a wintry craft and tasked with creating a look-alike, spring-themed cake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the remaining bakers to combine destination desserts with classic snacks; the bakers create a two-dessert landscape resembling a vacation in a national forest, amusement park, city or tropical beach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.sub-title: Spring Gardens: The Birds and the Bugs
programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the final bakers to create spring songbird-themed desserts; to win the title and $25,000 prize, bakers must make a spring garden cake with a surprise design element inside.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Host Ali Khan challenges the bakers to invent their own spring delight featuring cookies, ice cream and fruit; they're assigned classic cookies to turn into spring desserts.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: Chef Brad Miller visits an Orange County food truck with a custom smoker on board; Brad tries classic Cajun dishes with a twist in Austin, Texas; in Los Angeles, Bard discovers an ice cream truck without a freezer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: Innovative spins on the classic grilled cheese sandwich; a veritable sushi bar on wheels with fresh tuna and wagyu beef; fresh funnel cake and ice cream to create a whole new dessert.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: A food truck owned by an actual Italian prince, Prince Emanuele di Savoia; winning over locals with authentic handmade pastas, like bucatini with lemon sauce; Brad travels to Minneapolis.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.sub-title: Crepes, Indian-Spiced Meatballs and Hot Dogs
programme.desc: A husband-and-wife-owned truck in Los Angeles that is winning over Californians with crepes; a taste of Indian street food in North Carolina; a larger-than-life hot dog cart that's putting a delicious spin on the American classic.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: A pair of period pharmacies on both coasts, a Jewish deli in Texas, a hot dog temple in Tennessee and a classic, chrome-clad diner in Minnesota; from massive old-fashioned sundaes and skyscraper sandwiches to towering patty melts and doughnuts.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: A country-style breakfast as the sun rises over Charleston, S.C.; lunch break with Asian-inspired dishes in Chicago; limoncello cake for dessert in San Francisco; a midnight snack and a nightcap in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Diners live the gooey good life at these restaurants across the nation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Diners make mouthwatering memories at monumental sites, from sandwiches stacked with international flavors across the street from the National Zoo in Washington, D.C., to silky, sweet ice cream sundaes near Golden Gate Park in San Francisco.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: From the paper-thin crusts of New York, to the wood-fired ovens of the west coast, to the bottomless deep dish of Chicago, Roger presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: From the Atlantic seaboard to the Pacific coast, down deep in the bayou and high in the Rockies, Roger travels America to reel in the fifteen very best seafood dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 best chicken dishes; from frying and baking to grilling, Roger hangs out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food offerings.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla.; Stuffed Crust Bacon-Za; Peanut Butter Pork Donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot; ThurtenE Carnival at Washington University in St. Louis, where he gets his fill of delicious school spirit.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like Cajun boudin tacos and pecan pie pops; basking in the lights of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the neighborhoods that make Chicago a culinary treasure trove, from handcrafted burgers in the West Loop to street-style tacos in Wicker Park and barbecue chicken served up in Bronzeville.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the adventurous city of Zagreb in Croatia; the city's cuisine has a meat-focused menu and celebrates iconic dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore; from sticky-sweet saltwater taffy to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew samples traditional dishes in Bangkok including steamed whole bass, massaman curry and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern is in El Paso, Texas, to dive into its rich food culture; he tries everything from traditional fajitas and menudo to rolled tacos and entomatadas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the local favorites in central New York, finding beef and veal sausages at one of America's oldest hot dog stands, half-moon cookies that predate New York City's iconic black and white cookie and more.

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits Wilmington, N.C., for a barbecue bonanza, a crazy burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Charlotte, N.C., for three takes on Southern specialties; there's a cheesy chicken classic, care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, N.J.; he munches on homemade mozzarella, takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth and comes face-to-face with a slice of pure fire.

programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shows off a full day of Thanksgiving eats, including turkey, homemade pies and irresistible sides.
